2987341.title: The midnight hour - concealed longings
2987341.description: Welcome to the Midnight Hour, the show bringing you everything from blood and guts to satisfy all your horror film needs. Tonight, tensions rise as our leads have to deal with the elephant in the room and it could have disastrous results...
